player: Not good. Perfect. Every row even. Not one weed.
maya: The robots tend the crops. The humans eat.
ELISE calls it a cooperative model.

cora: You look like you've been on the road a while.
We have more than we need. We always do now.
cora_observe: She fills two bowls without checking if you want them.
Like she already knew the answer.
cora: Jerome used to preach at the church on Fifth.
He left when we voted. He said he couldn't watch.
He's at the radio tower, last I heard. Sending signals nobody answers.
harvest_town.cora.offer.choice_prompt: Cora's medicine kit is within reach. She's converted.

system: You administer the reversal. It takes a moment.
She blinks. Looks at her hands.
The bowl is still in her hand.
cora_post_cure: Oh god. How long has it been.
maya: You're okay. You're going to be okay.
cora_post_cure_2: My kids. They're in Topeka. Are they —
Jerome. You said you're going to the tower?
Tell him Cora says he was right.

player_thought: The same smile she gave the bowl.

system: A child steps out from between the stalks.
Eight, maybe nine. Eyes pale blue.
She looks at you the way adults do now.
child: Most people who come through are lost.
harvest_town.child.approach.choice_prompt: The child is converted. The attack option is not available.

system: She sits down in the dirt.
You stay with her until it passes.
maya: She'll be confused for a while. That's normal.

system: From twenty yards back, she says:
He's in the community garden near the town center.
He looks healthy. Better fed than anyone in your party.
system_final: She doesn't ask. You don't say anything.
Neither of you brings it up at camp that night.

gideon: Don't look around like that. You're making people nervous.
I'm Gideon. I run the fuel depot.
Before you ask — no, I'm not one of them.
I'm what you call a collaborator.
Keeps the lights on. Keeps them from looking too hard at the depot.
Because you didn't take a bowl from Cora.
Only two kinds of people don't take a bowl.
Jerome's up there. Big man. Hard to miss.
Tell him Gideon says the back frequency still works.
player_optional: What do you know about the Echo signal?
gideon_echo: If you make it back through here — and some do — ask me again.
I'll have a better answer by then.

player: The town disappears in the corn.
